underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = mental health AND condition_severity = High AND treatment_status = None
exclusion_terms: No cover for self-harm related events in first 24 months
underwriting_manual.description: High severity untreated mental health presentation is excluded due to immediate volatility risk.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = mental health AND condition_severity = High AND treatment_status = Ongoing AND medication = Yes
underwriting_manual.description: High severity with active management requires specialist review instead of automatic decline.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = mental health AND condition_severity = Medium AND prior_claims = Yes
underwriting_manual.description: Prior claims and medium severity increase expected utilization; loading applied.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = mental health AND condition_severity = Medium AND treatment_status = Completed AND diagnosis_duration >= 24
underwriting_manual.description: Sustained stability after completed treatment can be accepted under standard terms.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = mental health AND condition_severity = Low AND treatment_status = None
underwriting_manual.description: Low severity without treatment evidence requires clinical clarification.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = mental health AND condition_severity = High AND applicant_age < 25
underwriting_manual.description: Early-onset high severity cases are escalated to assess progression risk.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = mental health AND condition_severity = High AND alcohol_usage = High
exclusion_terms: No coverage for substance-induced relapse events
underwriting_manual.description: Comorbid high alcohol usage amplifies relapse and morbidity risk.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = mental health AND condition_severity = Low AND treatment_status = Ongoing
underwriting_manual.description: Low severity with active treatment may attract minor loading pending trend data.

underwriting_manual.rule_name: Medium Severity High Risk Occupation Refer
underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = mental health AND condition_severity = Medium AND occupation_risk_level = High
underwriting_manual.description: Operational safety exposure requires specialist underwriting review.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = mental health AND condition_severity = Medium AND medication = No AND treatment_status = Ongoing
underwriting_manual.description: Ongoing care without medication may indicate unstable management pattern.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = mental health AND condition_severity = Medium AND diagnosis_duration >= 60 AND prior_claims = No
underwriting_manual.description: Long-duration stable profile with clean claims may be accepted.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = mental health AND condition_severity = Medium AND smoking_status = Yes AND bmi > 33
underwriting_manual.description: Legacy strict rule creates deliberate conflict with modern referral guidance.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = mental health AND treatment_status = Completed AND diagnosis_duration >= 12
underwriting_manual.description: Simplified fast-track acceptance, intentionally broad and potentially over-lenient.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = mental health AND condition_severity = High AND prior_claims = Yes
exclusion_terms: No benefit for recurrent psychiatric admissions
underwriting_manual.description: Claims history plus high severity exceeds appetite.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = mental health AND condition_severity = Low AND income_band = High
underwriting_manual.description: Commercially conservative rule for higher sum-assured cohorts.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = mental health AND condition_severity = Medium AND diagnosis_duration BETWEEN 6 AND 12
underwriting_manual.description: Intermediate duration band lacks clear stability evidence.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = headache AND condition_severity = High
underwriting_manual.description: High severity headache generally loaded unless additional red flags apply.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = headache AND condition_severity = Medium AND occupation_risk_level = High
underwriting_manual.description: Safety critical occupations need specialist review for headache triggers.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = headache AND condition_severity = Low AND prior_claims = No
underwriting_manual.description: Low severity with clean claims history accepted.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = headache AND condition_severity = High AND smoking_status = Yes
exclusion_terms: No cover for neurological events tied to chronic migraine
underwriting_manual.description: Legacy strict rule intentionally conflicts with newer loading logic.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = headache AND condition_severity = Medium AND treatment_status = Completed
underwriting_manual.description: Completed treatment with medium severity may be accepted.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = headache AND condition_severity = Medium AND treatment_status = Ongoing
underwriting_manual.description: Active treatment indicates persistent risk, moderate load applied.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = headache AND condition_severity = High AND alcohol_usage = High
underwriting_manual.description: Potential trigger amplification requires referral.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = headache AND condition_severity = Low
underwriting_manual.description: Overly broad acceptance rule retained for speed, misses occupation effects.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = diabetes AND condition_severity = High AND bmi > 34
exclusion_terms: No diabetic complication coverage first 36 months
underwriting_manual.description: High severity diabetes with obesity has elevated complication risk.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = diabetes AND condition_severity = Medium
underwriting_manual.description: Medium severity diabetes gets standard loading.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = diabetes AND condition_severity = Low AND treatment_status = Ongoing AND medication = Yes
underwriting_manual.description: Controlled low severity diabetic profile accepted.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = diabetes AND prior_claims = Yes
underwriting_manual.description: Claims history triggers referral for complications screening.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = diabetes AND smoking_status = Yes AND condition_severity IN (Medium, High)
underwriting_manual.description: Smoking interaction leads to high loading.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = diabetes AND condition_severity = Low
underwriting_manual.description: Legacy broad accept rule may understate occupation/lifestyle risk.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = diabetes AND treatment_status = None
underwriting_manual.description: Untreated diabetes requires clinical evidence.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = diabetes AND condition_severity = Medium AND diagnosis_duration >= 120
exclusion_terms: No cover for advanced diabetic sequelae
underwriting_manual.description: Deliberately strict long-duration rule to create conflict realism.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = hypertension AND condition_severity = High
underwriting_manual.description: High severity hypertension usually referred for cardiac workup.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = hypertension AND condition_severity = Medium
underwriting_manual.description: Medium severity hypertension loaded by default.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = hypertension AND condition_severity = Low AND prior_claims = No
underwriting_manual.description: Low severity no-claims hypertension accepted.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = hypertension AND bmi > 33
underwriting_manual.description: Obesity interaction requires referral review.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = hypertension
underwriting_manual.description: Simplistic fallback load for all hypertension cases.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition = hypertension AND treatment_status = Completed AND diagnosis_duration >= 36
underwriting_manual.description: Long-term completed treatment profile can be accepted.

underwriting_manual.criteria: occupation_risk_level = High AND condition_severity != Low
underwriting_manual.description: Cross-condition escalation for operational hazard occupations.

underwriting_manual.criteria: applicant_age < 25 AND condition_severity = Low AND prior_claims = No
underwriting_manual.description: Fast-track rule, intentionally simplistic.

underwriting_manual.criteria: smoking_status = Yes AND alcohol_usage = High
underwriting_manual.description: Combined lifestyle factors attract loading irrespective of condition.

underwriting_manual.criteria: income_band = Low AND prior_claims = Yes
underwriting_manual.description: Financial stress and claims history escalated for review.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition_severity = High AND treatment_status = Completed AND diagnosis_duration < 6
underwriting_manual.description: Potential data inconsistency path for manual adjudication.

underwriting_manual.criteria: condition_severity = High AND prior_claims = Yes AND smoking_status = Yes
exclusion_terms: No cover for pre-existing progression events
underwriting_manual.description: Overly strict legacy rule to mimic historical policy bias.
